description: Fintual is a Chile-based investment platform for regulated savings and investing products such as mutual funds, APV, stocks, and ETFs. Its site also publishes legal and fund documentation for those products.
summary: fintual.cl exposes one published REST API surface, Fintual API V1 at `https://fintual.cl/api`, with Swagger docs/spec; no public evidence of CLI, GraphQL, or MCP developer surfaces was found.
